-----------------------------------------------------------------

With a Times Digital Subscription, you get unlimited access to 
thought-provoking features, opinion and multimedia so you stay 
fully informed. 

Be a part of our influential audience of Times readers that stays 
up to the minute with the most relevant news from around the globe, 
24 hours a day. See developments unfold at home or on the go, with 
full access to NYTimes.com and our award-winning smartphone and 
tablet apps. 

So go beyond 10 articles each month. Unlock your Times access right 
now and stay on top of all the latest news.

*****

JUST $5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

Get unlimited access to:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1f3b1da3elayfousuanwe6kyaaaaaazy52vsqsldsmyyaaaaa

Give a Times Gift subscription and Save 30%

Give someone special on your shopping list 12 or 26 weeks of 
The Times. Choose from digital gift subscription options that 
include full access to NYTimes.com and our smartphone or tablet 
apps, or both. Or select one of our convenient home delivery 
options that come with FREE, unlimited access to NYTimes.com 
and our apps.

GIVE A GIFT:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/18d21725alayfousuanwe6laaaaaaazy52vsqsldsmyyaaaaa

You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices.

reside in areas served by The New York Times Delivery Service and 
for recipients who have not had home delivery of The Times within 
the past 90 days. All Digital Access ends when the gift subscription 
ends. Offer is subject to additional restrictions or limitations. 

If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access 
will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Other restrictions and taxes 
may apply.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

A Boutique Wine Experience Delivered at 50% Off 

Enjoy the world of wine with The New York Times Wine Club -- 
your premier provider of impeccable wine selections delivered 
conveniently to your door. For a limited time, save 50% off 
your first Wine Club shipment.

LEARN MORE:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/174c579ealayfousuanparmyaaaaaazy52vsqsgom4eyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Take a South American Cruise With Times Journalists 

Enjoy a voyage of learning and delight, February 19 - March 4, 
with experts in various fields as well as celebrated New York 
Times journalists. Save $100 with this special offer 
from Times Journeys.

LEARN MORE:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1328ba616layfousuanparniaaaaaazy52vsqsgom4eyaaaaa 

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be 
billed $5 for the first 12 weeks up front which is 
nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will 
automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will 
be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless 
canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and 
termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. 
Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply. 

Wine Club offer applies to first Wine Club recurring shipment 
only and cannot be combined with other promotions. Subsequent 
shipments will be billed at the standard member price. 
Restrictions apply. Offer does not apply to existing Wine Club 
members, one-time Wine Gifts or Wine Shop. The New York Times 
has chosen Global Wine Company and its panel of experts to 
select the wines and operate the clubs on our behalf. The Wine 
Club is operated without participation from The Times's critics 
or other members of the newsroom. 

Cruise prices vary from $1,599 for an Interior Stateroom to 
$5,999 for a Deluxe Suite, per person. (Cruise pricing is 
subject to change.) For those attending our PROGRAM, there is a 
$1,575 fee. Taxes and fees are $399 per person. Gratuities are 
$156 per person. Both Chile and Argentina charge an entrance fee 
of $160 per person. Times Journeys speakers have confirmed their 
intent to participate though scheduling conflicts may arise. 
Times Journeys is produced for The New York Times by Insight 
Cruises. CST 2065380-40

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Because you are a valued reader of the world's finest news site, 
we want to offer you the chance to try unlimited access to all 
of the award-winning news, opinions, videos and interactive 
features available to Digital Subscribers at this special rate 
of just $5 for your first 12 weeks.* 

Join the influential audience of Times readers who stay up to 
the minute with timely news from the finest reporters, keeping 
you informed around the clock on your computer, smartphone or 
tablet. Follow the latest on fall films, fashion and football 
and never miss a beat with our breaking news coverage. And with 
a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have to limit 
yourself to 10 articles a month. 

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL OFFER 

This offer is only available to select NYTimes.com readers. Try 
unlimited digital access to The New York Times for just $5 for 
your first 12 weeks, and see why The Times is an experience you 
won't find anywhere else.
